resume_behavior: The checkpoint is saved after every epoch. Rerunning full_command resumes until the requested epoch count is reached.
dataset: CIFAR-10 clean test plus CIFAR-10-C corruptions, severities 1-5
model: ResNet-18 for CIFAR-10, implemented locally without torchvision
route: penultimate embedding PCA subspace; use small dimensions such as 1,2,4 because the output distribution has only 10 classes
matching: correct, high-confidence, low-entropy, high-margin; paired within class on scalar and gradient covariates
